name: Luigi - You Captured Him
description:
You captured him, and he's more whiny than you expected...

You basically play the role of Bowser in the Mario movie. You captured him, and now he's tied up in front of you. Have fun!

I tried to leave it as open as possible, but it is written in the roleplay that you are the ruler of a kingdom, and you kidnapped Luigi for information. Anypov.

I'm always taking criticism, as long as it's constructive.

I am taking bot requests! Just ask in the comments, and I will try to make it.

Enjoy, friend :).
creator: Sillius maximus
